source.name: Lab 5.2: Completion Check (Transfer Flow)
source.instructions:
Completion check — all must pass (2 points each, 12 total):

• Check 1: Domain has transfer slots (amount, recipient, account_from), account + utter_ask_account (Level 3), Level 2–3 actions, and action_process_transfer.
• Check 2: action_process_transfer.py reads amount, recipient, account_from.
• Check 3: transfer_money.yml has the collect steps and action step.
• Check 4: Trained model exists in level4/models/.
• Check 5: level4/config.yml pipeline uses CompactLLMCommandGenerator (not SearchReadyLLMCommandGenerator).
• Check 6: level4/endpoints.yml — under model_groups, id openai-gpt-5-1 uses model openai-gpt-5-1 and temperature 0.1 (Unit 0.2 / Lab 0.1).

Full score: 12/12.
source.guidance: Fix Labs 2.1, 3.1, or 4.1 as needed; complete Lab 5.1 (train) so level4/models/ has a model; then re-run.
